# ChallengeCAT

ChallengeCAT builds playful Solana-native community challenge experiences.

## CNYAN

```text
CA / Mint: Ayfr5kqa2VsXzo8D2CB59pUaLCeG5GnVHod4ixutpump
Network: Solana
Symbol: CNYAN
```

CNYAN connects missions, proof submissions, bounty maps, and reward flows into one community-facing demo.

## Focus

- Solana token identity
- CNYAN/SOL reward flows
- map-based challenges
- Odyssey Network route context
- Perplex-style answer demos
- multilingual documentation
